## Architecture

## Key files

> **Replace this.** A list of the ~10-20 most important files with one-line descriptions. The agent should be able to read this list and know where to look for any common task.

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `src/main.ts` | Entry point. Wires up the dependency graph and starts the server. |
| `src/config.ts` | All environment variables read here. Don't read `process.env` elsewhere. |
| `...` | `...` |

## Where to add things

> **Replace this.** A "if you want to add X, put it in Y" guide. Reduces the agent's chances of inventing a new directory structure.

- New HTTP route → `src/routes/`
- New database query → `src/db/queries/`
- New shared utility → `src/lib/`
- New external API client → use the OpenAPI generator; see `apis/`

## Conventions specific to this codebase

> Anything an agent could only learn by reading a lot of code, surfaced here.

- Error type: we use `Result<T, AppError>` everywhere; no exceptions thrown across module boundaries.
- Logging: structured via `pino`; never `console.log`.
- Config: read once at boot, immutable after.
